base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of scrap_brain — a tile from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Scrap Brain Zone — Acts 1-3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scrap Brain Zone — Acts 1-3; Eggman's industrial factory
